text:
EmailPilot — overview:
EmailPilot watches your inbox and drafts replies that sound like you. It learns your tone from past sent messages and pulls context from attached files. You stay in control: every reply lands as a draft until you hit send.
Target audience: Founders, consultants, and customer-facing roles drowning in email.

EmailPilot — features:
  - Tone-matched draft replies
  - Attachment-aware context
  - Per-thread summary
  - Snooze and follow-up reminders
  - Works with Gmail and Outlook

EmailPilot — refund & cancellation policy:
Full refund within 14 days of first purchase.

EmailPilot — integrations:
  - Gmail
  - Outlook
  - Google Drive
  - Notion

InvoiceFlow — overview:
InvoiceFlow turns a one-line description into a polished invoice in seconds. Automatic reminders go out on day 3, 7, and 14 after due date. Payments arrive directly into your bank through Stripe or Razorpay.
Target audience: Freelancers, agencies, and small service businesses.

InvoiceFlow — features:
  - Branded invoice templates
  - Multi-currency support
  - Automatic late reminders
  - Stripe and Razorpay payouts
  - GST and VAT compliant

InvoiceFlow — refund & cancellation policy:
Pro-rated refund within 14 days of first purchase.

InvoiceFlow — integrations:
  - Stripe
  - Razorpay
  - QuickBooks
  - Zoho Books

TaskGrid — overview:
TaskGrid is a task tracker that feels like a spreadsheet but behaves like a project tool. Group, filter, and pivot tasks by anyone, due date, or custom tag. Built for teams that find Jira too heavy and a checklist too thin.
Target audience: Small ops teams, founders, and operations leads.

TaskGrid — features:
  - Spreadsheet-style task grid
  - Custom fields and tags
  - Saved views per teammate
  - CSV import and export
  - Slack and email digests

TaskGrid — refund & cancellation policy:
Refund within 14 days for paid plans.

TaskGrid — integrations:
  - Slack
  - Google Calendar
  - GitHub
  - Linear

FormCraft — overview:
FormCraft helps you build conversational forms that double completion rates. Logic jumps, hidden fields, and partial response capture come standard. Submissions land in a clean dashboard or any webhook you point at.
Target audience: Marketers, researchers, and customer success teams.

FormCraft — features:
  - Conversational and classic layouts
  - Logic jumps and hidden fields
  - Partial response capture
  - File uploads up to 50 MB
  - Webhook and Zapier output

FormCraft — refund & cancellation policy:
Refund within 14 days of first paid purchase.

FormCraft — integrations:
  - Zapier
  - Webhooks
  - Google Sheets
  - HubSpot

CalendarSync — overview:
CalendarSync gives every teammate a polished booking link with built-in buffer time and meeting caps. Connect Google or Microsoft calendars and let attendees pick from real free slots. Round-robin and collective scheduling are built in.
Target audience: Sales, recruiting, and any role that lives in meetings.

CalendarSync — features:
  - Personal booking pages
  - Round-robin and collective slots
  - Daily meeting cap and buffer time
  - Zoom, Meet, and Teams links
  - Two-way Google and Microsoft sync

CalendarSync — refund & cancellation policy:
14 day refund window.

CalendarSync — integrations:
  - Google Calendar
  - Microsoft 365
  - Zoom
  - Google Meet
  - Microsoft Teams

NoteHub — overview:
NoteHub is a markdown-first notes app with backlinks and a graph view. Pages cross-reference automatically as you type. Search runs locally so it stays fast even with 10,000 notes.
Target audience: Researchers, writers, and engineering teams.

NoteHub — features:
  - Markdown editor with live preview
  - Backlinks and graph view
  - Local-first search
  - Daily journal template
  - End-to-end encrypted sync

NoteHub — refund & cancellation policy:
14 day refund window.

NoteHub — integrations:
  - Obsidian export
  - Apple Notes import
  - Markdown export

ChatRelay — overview:
ChatRelay is a website chat widget and inbox for small teams. Route by topic, set business hours, and auto-reply when nobody is online. Connect to email, WhatsApp, and Slack so no message slips through.
Target audience: Small support teams, e-commerce shops, SaaS startups.

ChatRelay — features:
  - Embeddable chat widget
  - Multi-channel inbox
  - Topic routing
  - Business-hours auto-reply
  - Saved replies and shortcuts

ChatRelay — refund & cancellation policy:
14 day refund window.

ChatRelay — integrations:
  - Slack
  - WhatsApp Business
  - Email
  - Zapier

SignPath — overview:
SignPath collects legally valid e-signatures with a flat monthly fee. Drag fields onto a PDF, pick signers, and track who has opened, viewed, and signed. Audit trail is included by default.
Target audience: Sales ops, HR, and legal in small companies.

SignPath — features:
  - Drag-to-place signature fields
  - Sequential and parallel signers
  - Audit trail with IP and timestamp
  - Bulk send to up to 200 recipients
  - Templates for common contracts

SignPath — refund & cancellation policy:
14 day refund window for first purchase.

SignPath — integrations:
  - Google Drive
  - Dropbox
  - Salesforce
  - HubSpot

PollWise — overview:
PollWise is a focused tool for short surveys and quick polls. Distribute by link, email, or QR code. Get instant cross-tabs and CSV exports without spreadsheet wrangling.
Target audience: Product, marketing, and research teams.

PollWise — features:
  - Single-question or multi-question polls
  - QR code distribution
  - Live result dashboards
  - Cross-tabs and filters
  - Anonymous mode

PollWise — refund & cancellation policy:
14 day refund window.

PollWise — integrations:
  - Slack
  - Google Sheets
  - Microsoft Teams

ReceiptVault — overview:
ReceiptVault turns paper receipts and email confirmations into searchable expense records. OCR extracts merchant, amount, currency, and tax in seconds. Sync to your accounting tool or export a tidy CSV at month end.
Target audience: Founders, traveling professionals, and finance ops.

ReceiptVault — features:
  - Mobile receipt capture
  - Email forwarding ingestion
  - OCR with currency and tax extraction
  - Per-project tagging
  - Sync to QuickBooks and Zoho Books

ReceiptVault — refund & cancellation policy:
14 day refund window.

ReceiptVault — integrations:
  - QuickBooks
  - Zoho Books
  - Tally
  - Google Drive

TimeMark — overview:
TimeMark is a quiet time tracker for individuals and small teams. Auto-detects what you are working on and groups it by project at the end of the day. One-click invoices feed into InvoiceFlow.
Target audience: Freelancers and small agencies.

TimeMark — features:
  - Auto-detection of active project
  - Manual time entries
  - Per-project hourly rates
  - Weekly digests
  - InvoiceFlow handoff

TimeMark — refund & cancellation policy:
14 day refund window.

TimeMark — integrations:
  - InvoiceFlow
  - TaskGrid
  - Toggl import
  - CSV export

DocuMerge — overview:
DocuMerge merges, splits, compresses, and signs PDFs from one clean interface. Drag in 100 files, get one tidy PDF. Built on a local engine so your documents never leave your browser unless you ask.
Target audience: Anyone who works with PDFs more than once a week.

DocuMerge — features:
  - Merge, split, rotate, reorder pages
  - Compress without quality loss
  - Local processing in browser
  - Optional cloud history
  - Batch rename

DocuMerge — refund & cancellation policy:
14 day refund window.

DocuMerge — integrations:
  - Google Drive
  - Dropbox
  - OneDrive

KanbanLite — overview:
KanbanLite is a fast, no-frills board for visual task flow. Columns, cards, and a single label per card. Made for teams that want kanban without ten plugins.
Target audience: Engineering and design teams.

KanbanLite — features:
  - Unlimited boards on paid plans
  - Keyboard-driven card creation
  - Single label per card by design
  - Public read-only links
  - JSON import and export

KanbanLite — refund & cancellation policy:
14 day refund window.

KanbanLite — integrations:
  - TaskGrid
  - GitHub Issues
  - CSV

MeetMinutes — overview:
MeetMinutes joins your Zoom, Meet, or Teams call and writes structured notes. Decisions, action items, and open questions land in your inbox five minutes after the call ends. Full transcript stays searchable.
Target audience: Product, sales, and leadership teams.

MeetMinutes — features:
  - Auto-join via calendar
  - Decision and action-item extraction
  - Speaker-aware transcripts
  - Searchable archive
  - Privacy mode for muted segments

MeetMinutes — refund & cancellation policy:
14 day refund window.

MeetMinutes — integrations:
  - Zoom
  - Google Meet
  - Microsoft Teams
  - Slack
  - Notion

PixelDeck — overview:
PixelDeck is for engineers and educators who want polished decks without dragging text boxes. Write in markdown, get a deck that looks designed. Export as PDF, PPTX, or a hosted URL.
Target audience: Engineers, educators, and technical founders.

PixelDeck — features:
  - Markdown editor with live preview
  - 20 themes, 5 color schemes
  - PDF, PPTX, and hosted-URL export
  - Speaker notes
  - Diagram blocks (flow, sequence, mermaid)

PixelDeck — refund & cancellation policy:
14 day refund window.

PixelDeck — integrations:
  - GitHub
  - Google Drive
  - Notion

InboxClean — overview:
InboxClean groups your inbox into Now, Later, and Forever-Maybe. Bulk unsubscribe with one tap. Promotions and receipts get auto-filed using ReceiptVault rules.
Target audience: Executives, founders, and consultants.

InboxClean — features:
  - Now, Later, Maybe triage view
  - One-tap bulk unsubscribe
  - Sender reputation scoring
  - Promotions auto-filing
  - Snooze with smart resurface

InboxClean — refund & cancellation policy:
14 day refund window.

InboxClean — integrations:
  - Gmail
  - Outlook
  - ReceiptVault

TeamPulse — overview:
TeamPulse runs short, recurring surveys that take 90 seconds to answer. Trends show up over weeks, not after a yearly engagement push. Anonymous by default and aggregated above a five-person floor.
Target audience: People ops and engineering managers.

TeamPulse — features:
  - Weekly, biweekly, or monthly cadence
  - Anonymous by default
  - Five-person aggregation floor
  - eNPS and custom themes
  - Slack and Teams delivery

TeamPulse — refund & cancellation policy:
14 day refund window.

TeamPulse — integrations:
  - Slack
  - Microsoft Teams
  - BambooHR
  - Workday export

LinkVault — overview:
LinkVault is a shared bookmark manager for teams. Saved links get auto-tagged and re-checked weekly so dead URLs surface fast. Searchable from a browser extension or a Slack slash command.
Target audience: Research, design, and engineering teams.

LinkVault — features:
  - Browser extension and Slack command
  - Auto-tagging from page content
  - Weekly dead-link sweep
  - Per-collection sharing
  - Read later queue

LinkVault — refund & cancellation policy:
14 day refund window.

LinkVault — integrations:
  - Slack
  - Chrome
  - Firefox
  - Safari

BillSplit — overview:
BillSplit gives small SaaS companies the subscription, dunning, and invoicing flow that usually takes a quarter to build. Hosted checkout, customer portal, and webhook events are all included. Switch on tax handling per country with one toggle.
Target audience: Indie SaaS founders and small SaaS companies.

BillSplit — features:
  - Hosted checkout and portal
  - Dunning and retry policy
  - Per-country tax handling
  - Stripe and Razorpay backends
  - Webhook event stream

BillSplit — refund & cancellation policy:
14 day refund window for first purchase.

BillSplit — integrations:
  - Stripe
  - Razorpay
  - QuickBooks
  - Webhooks

AuditTrail — overview:
AuditTrail records who did what, where, and when across your stack. SOC 2 and ISO 27001 evidence packs are generated on demand. Drop in one SDK and your logs become audit-ready.
Target audience: Engineering and security teams in regulated industries.

AuditTrail — features:
  - Append-only event log
  - SOC 2 and ISO 27001 evidence packs
  - Per-user activity timeline
  - Configurable retention
  - SDKs for Node, Python, Go

AuditTrail — refund & cancellation policy:
14 day refund window for first purchase.

AuditTrail — integrations:
  - AWS CloudTrail
  - Datadog
  - Splunk
  - Webhooks
